name: Department of Homeland Security v. Regents of the University of California
question:
1. Is the Department of Homeland Security’s decision to wind down the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) policy judicially reviewable? 
  2. Is DHS’s decision to wind down the DACA policy lawful?
description: A case in which the Court held that the Department of Homeland Security’s decision to rescind the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program was arbitrary and capricious under the Administrative Procedure Act.
